question_text: Let (𝑋, 𝑌)𝑇 follow a bivariate normal distribution with E(𝑋) = 2, E(𝑌) = 3, Var(𝑋) = 16, Var(𝑌) = 25, and Cov(𝑋, 𝑌) = 14. Then 2𝜋 (Pr(𝑋> 2, 𝑌> 3) −1 equals ____________ (rounded off to two decimal places). Q. No. Session Q. Type Section Key/Range Marks MCQ NAT -1 to -1 NAT 50 to 50 NAT 3 to 3 NAT 8 to 8 NAT 16 to 16 NAT 10 to 10 NAT 9 to 9 NAT 0.59 to 0.61 NAT 18 to 18 NAT 0.98 to 1.00 NAT 0.79 to 0.81 MCQ MSQ
